'''Gunham''' was a [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] and Imperial Pilot Coordinator of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]].

==Biography==
During [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], Gunham was stationed at the [[Bestine (city)/Legends|Bestine]] capitol on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. His main job was to oversee the recruitment of pilots under [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Cilas Veckon|Veckon's]] aggressive push for new pilots. Periodically, he would also process papers for pilots who wished to resign, but not without chiding them first.

==Behind the scenes==
Commander Gunham is a [[Wikipedia:non-player character|Non-Player Character]] in the [[Wikipedia:MMORPG|MMORPG]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''. In the game, players can talk to him to resign from the Imperial Starfleet.
